rationale.R1.1: Identifies the conceptual issue of LLM bias towards verbose SQL and proposes a reframing that addresses it.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior work (Spider 2.0, BIRD) and articulates the delta introduced by QuerySieve.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty about the strength of evidence for leaderboard-wide impact.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the requested dimensions: debiasing protocol, SQL-Eval results, judge robustness.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are introduced; identifies harmful patterns (length bias) in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are not traced back to sources.
